# PetroSafeTech Co. (PetroSafe / PST)

> PetroSafe (PetroSafeTech Co., شركة بيتر وسيف تيك) is a Saudi Aramco–registered industrial supply
> company (Vendor ID 10118438) headquartered in Al Khobar, Eastern Province, Saudi Arabia,
> supplying project supplies, construction materials, hardware, industrial piping, plumbing &
> sanitary ware, safety equipment (PPE), electrical solutions, precast accessories, machinery,
> tools and equipment with Kingdom-wide delivery.

## Supply divisions
- Industrial Piping & Flowline: carbon/stainless steel pipes, PVC/CPVC/UPVC/HDPE/PPR, fittings,
  flanges, gaskets, gate/globe/check/ball/butterfly/control valves, API 20E fasteners, hydraulic
  and industrial hoses, Camlock fittings, hammer unions.
- Plumbing & Sanitary: PPR/UPVC/CPVC/PEX/GI pipes & fittings, brass valves, angle valves, mixers,
  taps, shattaf sets, water tanks, booster pumps, grease traps, floor drains, water closets,
  wash basins, urinals, concealed cisterns, bathroom accessories.
- Safety Equipment (PPE): helmets, eyewear, hearing and respiratory protection (incl. SCBA),
  gloves, safety footwear, FR coveralls, fall protection, fire extinguishers and alarm systems,
  spill kits, flammable storage cabinets, LOTO, signage, first aid.
- Electrical Solutions: LED and industrial lighting, wiring devices, LV power/instrumentation/data
  cables, conduits and cable management, distribution panels, MCB/MCCB/RCD breakers, earthing and
  lightning protection, testers and multimeters.
- Precast Solutions & Industrial Tools: rebar spacers, lifting anchors, wire rope and chain slings,
  measuring and testing equipment, welding machines, hand tools, power tools, consumables.

## Key facts
- Saudi Aramco Vendor ID: 10118438
- Address: Prince Talal Street, Cross 8-9, Al Shamaliyah, Al Khobar, Saudi Arabia
- Phone / WhatsApp: +966 55 384 4649 · +966 55 533 6537
- Email: sales@petrosafeksa.com
- Website: https://www.petrosafeksa.com
- Hours: Sunday–Thursday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Arabia Standard Time)
- Customers can attach an RFQ/BOQ file on the website quote form for an itemized quotation.
